claims.summary: Transition artifacts need typed transition, spectral-delta, and subjective-anchor fields.
claims.disposition: Verified CorrespondenceTransitionPayload and transition-artifact parsing preserve those fields.

claims.summary: A transition needs a stable shared artifact identity.
claims.disposition: Verified transition_artifact and transition_id aliases survive parsing, ledgering, and status projection.

claims.summary: Shared transition receipt and replyability should be replayed end to end.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded correspondence replay over existing transition fixtures.

claims.summary: A transition artifact could lock shared state or trigger behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because locking and behavior transition change live state.
